content.text: Let me try a minimal proof first to verify the basic structure works:

input.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1

    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None

                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values

  <1>1. TypeOK

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

(* ===================== Helper lemmas ===================== *)

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA MessageTypes ==
  ASSUME NEW m \in Messages
  PROVE  m.type \in {"1a","1b","2a","2b"}
  BY DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
  BY DEF VotedForIn, TypeOK, Messages

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME MsgInv,
         NEW a1, NEW a2, NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
PROOF
  <1>1. PICK m1 \in msgs : m1.type = "2b" /\ m1.val = v1 /\ m1.bal = b /\ m1.acc = a1
    BY DEF VotedForIn
  <1>2. PICK m2 \in msgs : m2.type = "2b" /\ m2.val = v2 /\ m2.bal = b /\ m2.acc = a2
    BY DEF VotedForIn
  <1>3. PICK ma1 \in msgs : ma1.type = "2a" /\ ma1.bal = b /\ ma1.val = v1
    BY <1>1 DEF MsgInv
  <1>4. PICK ma2 \in msgs : ma2.type = "2a" /\ ma2.bal = b /\ ma2.val = v2
    BY <1>2 DEF MsgInv
  <1>5. ma2 = ma1 BY <1>3, <1>4 DEF MsgInv
  <1> QED BY <1>3, <1>4, <1>5

(* ===================== Initial state ===================== *)

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

(* ===================== Phase1a step ===================== *)

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>vf. \A a, v, c : VotedForIn(a, v, c)' <=> VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a, NEW v, NEW c
                 PROVE  VotedForIn(a, v, c)' <=> VotedForIn(a, v, c)
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, v, c) PROVE VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
      <3>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = c /\ m.acc = a
        BY <2>1 DEF VotedForIn
      <3>2. m \in msgs' BY <1>x, <3>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, v, c)' PROVE VotedForIn(a, v, c)
      <3>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = c /\ m.acc = a
        BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
      <3>2. m \in msgs
        <4>1. m \in msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]} BY <1>x, <3>1
        <4>2. m # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] BY <3>1
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>wv. \A a, c : WontVoteIn(a, c)' <=> WontVoteIn(a, c)
    BY <1>x, <1>vf DEF WontVoteIn
  <1>sa. \A v, c : SafeAt(v, c)' <=> SafeAt(v, c)
    BY <1>vf, <1>wv DEF SafeAt
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2> USE DEF TypeOK
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x
  <1>2. MsgInv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs'

    <2>2. CASE m \in msgs

(* ===================== Phase1b step ===================== *)

LEMMA Phase1bInv ==

PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>0. PICK m0 \in msgs :

(* ===================== Phase2b step ===================== *)

LEMMA Phase2bInv ==

    <2>2. m0.bal \in Ballots BY <1>m
    <2>3. maxVBal[a0] =< maxBal[a0] BY <1>mvb_le_mb

    <2>2. m \in msgs' BY <1>x, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn

          <5>0. m \in Messages BY <3>m_type
          <5>0a. m.acc \in Acceptors /\ m.bal \in Ballots BY <5>0 DEF Messages
          <5>1. /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                   /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                   /\ ma.val  = m.val
                /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
            BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
          <5>2. PICK ma \in msgs : ma.type = "2a" /\ ma.bal = m.bal /\ ma.val = m.val
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. ma \in msgs' BY <1>x, <5>2
          <5>4. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]'
            <6>1. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <5>1
            <6>2. CASE m.acc = a0
              <7>1. maxVBal[m.acc]' = m0.bal BY <1>maxVBal_a, <5>0a, <6>2
              <7>2. maxVBal[a0] =< m0.bal BY <1>mvb_le_m0bal
              <7>3. m.bal =< maxVBal[a0] BY <6>1, <6>2
              <7>4. m.bal =< m0.bal BY <7>3, <7>2, <1>old, <1>m, <5>0a, <6>2 DEF Ballots
              <7> QED BY <7>1, <7>4, <5>0a, <1>m DEF Ballots
            <6>3. CASE m.acc # a0
              <7>1. maxVBal[m.acc]' = maxVBal[m.acc] BY <1>maxVBal_a, <5>0a, <6>3
              <7> QED BY <7>1, <6>1
            <6> QED BY <6>2, <6>3
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <5>4
        <4> QED OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>x
  <1>3. AccInv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]'
                        /\ (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
          /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
          /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>2. CASE a = a0
      <3>1. maxVal[a]' = m0.val BY <1>maxVal_a, <2>2
      <3>2. maxVBal[a]' = m0.bal BY <1>maxVBal_a, <2>2
      <3>3. maxBal[a]' = m0.bal BY <1>maxBal_a, <2>2
      <3>4. (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1)
        <4>1. m0.val # None BY <1>m, NoneNotAValue
        <4>2. m0.bal # -1 BY <1>m DEF Ballots
        <4> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
      <3>5. maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]' BY <3>2, <3>3, <1>m DEF Ballots
      <3>6. (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
        <4>1. VotedForIn(a0, m0.val, m0.bal)' BY <1>vf_a0
        <4>2. a = a0 BY <2>2
        <4>3. VotedForIn(a, m0.val, m0.bal)' BY <4>1, <4>2
        <4> QED BY <4>3, <3>1, <3>2
      <3>7. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in Ballots, c > maxVBal[a]',
                            NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                     PROVE  FALSE
            OBVIOUS
        <4>1. c > m0.bal BY <3>2
        <4>2. c # m0.bal BY <4>1, <1>m DEF Ballots
        <4>3. VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ (a = a0 /\ v = m0.val /\ c = m0.bal)
           BY <1>vf_new
        <4>4. VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <4>2, <4>3
        <4>5. c > maxVBal[a]
          <5>1. maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a] BY <2>1
          <5>2. maxBal[a] =< m0.bal BY <1>mb_a0, <2>2
          <5>3. maxVBal[a] \in Ballots \cup {-1} BY <1>old, <2>2
          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Ballots \cup {-1} BY <1>old, <2>2
          <5>5. maxVBal[a] =< m0.bal BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>3, <5>4, <1>m DEF Ballots
          <5>6. c > m0.bal BY <3>2
          <5> QED BY <5>5, <5>6, <5>3, <1>m DEF Ballots
        <4>6. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) BY <2>1, <4>5
        <4> QED BY <4>4, <4>6
      <3> QED BY <3>4, <3>5, <3>6, <3>7
    <2>3. CASE a # a0
      <3>1. maxVal[a]' = maxVal[a] BY <1>maxVal_a, <2>3
      <3>2. maxVBal[a]' = maxVBal[a] BY <1>maxVBal_a, <2>3
      <3>3. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <1>maxBal_a, <2>3
      <3>4. (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1) BY <3>1, <3>2, <2>1
      <3>5. maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]' BY <3>2, <3>3, <2>1
      <3>6. (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
        <4>1. (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a]) BY <2>1
        <4>2. (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')
           BY <4>1, <3>1, <3>2
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <1>vf
      <3>7. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in Ballots, c > maxVBal[a]',
                            NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                     PROVE  FALSE
            OBVIOUS
        <4>1. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) BY <3>2, <2>1
        <4>2. ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <4>1
        <4>3. VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ (a = a0 /\ v = m0.val /\ c = m0.bal)
           BY <1>vf_new
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <2>3
      <3> QED BY <3>4, <3>5, <3>6, <3>7
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3

(* ===================== Combine into NextInv ===================== *)

LEMMA NextInv == Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv'
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
               PROVE  Inv'
       OBVIOUS
  <1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
    <2>1. /\ msgs' = msgs
          /\ maxBal' = maxBal
          /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
          /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY <1>1 DEF vars
    <2>2. \A a, v, c : VotedForIn(a, v, c)' <=> VotedForIn(a, v, c)
      BY <2>1 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>3. \A a, c : WontVoteIn(a, c)' <=> WontVoteIn(a, c)
      BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>4. \A v, c : SafeAt(v, c)' <=> SafeAt(v, c)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF SafeAt
    <2>5. TypeOK' BY <2>1 DEF Inv, TypeOK
    <2>6. MsgInv' BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>4 DEF Inv, MsgInv
    <2>7. AccInv' BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF Inv, AccInv
    <2> QED BY <2>5, <2>6, <2>7 DEF Inv
  <1>2. CASE Next
    <2>1. CASE \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b)
      <3>1. PICK b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY Phase1aInv, <3>1
    <2>2. CASE \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a)
      <3>1. PICK a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) BY <2>2
      <3> QED BY Phase1bInv, <3>1
    <2>3. CASE \E b \in Ballots : Phase2a(b)
      <3>1. PICK b \in Ballots : Phase2a(b) BY <2>3
      <3> QED BY Phase2aInv, <3>1
    <2>4. CASE \E a \in Acceptors : Phase2b(a)
      <3>1. PICK a \in Acceptors : Phase2b(a) BY <2>4
      <3> QED BY Phase2bInv, <3>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>2 DEF Next
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
  <1>1. Init => Inv BY InitInv
  <1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv' BY NextInv
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

input.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK
  <1> QED OMITTED

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

  PROVE  Inv'

  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal

    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK
  <1> QED OMITTED

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>2. (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1) BY <2>1, <1>x
    <2>3. maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]' BY <2>1, <1>x
    <2>4. (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'

      <3>2. ASSUME maxVBal[a]' >= 0 PROVE VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
        <4>1. maxVBal[a] >= 0 BY <3>2, <1>x
        <4>2. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a]) BY <4>1, <3>1
        <4>3. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])' BY <4>2, <1>vf1

      <3> QED BY <3>2
    <2>5. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'

                          NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                   PROVE  FALSE
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. c > maxVBal[a] BY <1>x
      <3>2. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) BY <2>1, <3>1
      <3>3. VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <1>vf2
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK
  <1>vf1. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf1 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs' BY <1>x, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1>vf2. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs
      <3>1. m \in msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]} BY <1>x, <2>1
      <3>2. m # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1> QED OMITTED

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK
  <1>vf1. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf1 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs' BY <1>x, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1>vf2. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs
      <3>1. m \in msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]} BY <1>x, <2>1
      <3>2. m # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1>wv1. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW cc, WontVoteIn(aa, cc) PROVE WontVoteIn(aa, cc)'
    <2>1. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <1>wv1 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>2. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)'
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
      <3>1. VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <1>vf2
      <3>2. ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2>3. maxBal[aa] > cc BY <1>wv1 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>4. maxBal[aa]' > cc BY <1>x, <2>3
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4 DEF WontVoteIn
  <1>wv2. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW cc, WontVoteIn(aa, cc)' PROVE WontVoteIn(aa, cc)
    <2>1. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <1>wv2 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>2. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
      <3>1. VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <1>vf1
      <3>2. ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2>3. maxBal[aa]' > cc BY <1>wv2 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>4. maxBal[aa] > cc BY <1>x, <2>3
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4 DEF WontVoteIn
  <1>sa1. ASSUME NEW vv, NEW bb, SafeAt(vv, bb) PROVE SafeAt(vv, bb)'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(bb-1)
                 PROVE \E Q \in Quorums :
                         \A aa \in Q : VotedForIn(aa, vv, c)' \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c)'
        BY DEF SafeAt
    <2>1. \E Q \in Quorums : \A aa \in Q : VotedForIn(aa, vv, c) \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c)
        BY <1>sa1 DEF SafeAt
    <2>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A aa \in Q : VotedForIn(aa, vv, c) \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c)
        BY <2>1
    <2>3. \A aa \in Q : VotedForIn(aa, vv, c)' \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c)'
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                   PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, c)' \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c)'
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. VotedForIn(aa, vv, c) \/ WontVoteIn(aa, c) BY <2>2
      <3>2. CASE VotedForIn(aa, vv, c) BY <3>2, <1>vf1
      <3>3. CASE WontVoteIn(aa, c) BY <3>3, <1>wv1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>3
  <1>2. MsgInv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs'
                 PROVE  /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                                              /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                                    /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                                                    /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                                                 \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                                    /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                                              /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
                        /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
                              /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
                              /\ \A ma \in msgs' : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
                        /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
                              /\ \E ma \in msgs' : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                                   /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                                   /\ ma.val  = m.val
                              /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]'
        BY DEF MsgInv
    <2>1. CASE m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]
      BY <2>1
    <2>2. CASE m \in msgs
      <3>1. (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                               /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                     /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                                  \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                     /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                     ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
        <4> ASSUME m.type = "1b"
            PROVE  /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                   /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                         /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                         /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                      \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                         /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                   /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          <5>1. /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                      /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                      /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
                   \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                      /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                      ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
            BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
          <5>2. m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]' BY <5>1, <1>x
          <5>3. \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                   /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                   /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                   /\ m.maxVBal = -1
            <6>1. CASE /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                      /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                      /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
              BY <6>1, <1>vf1
            <6>2. CASE m.maxVal = None /\ m.maxVBal = -1 BY <6>2
            <6> QED BY <5>1, <6>1, <6>2
          <5>4. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                  ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1),
                                NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
                         PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
            <6>1. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, vv, c) BY <5>1
            <6>2. VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c) BY <1>vf2
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <5>4
        <4> QED OBVIOUS
      <3>2. (m.type = "2a") =>
              /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
              /\ \A ma \in msgs' : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
        <4> ASSUME m.type = "2a"
            PROVE  /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
                   /\ \A ma \in msgs' : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
          <5>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal) BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
          <5>2. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)' BY <5>1, <1>sa1
          <5>3. \A ma \in msgs' : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW ma \in msgs', ma.type = "2a", ma.bal = m.bal
                         PROVE  ma = m
                OBVIOUS
            <6>1. ma \in msgs
              <7>1. ma \in msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]} BY <1>x
              <7>2. ma # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] BY DEF Messages
              <7> QED BY <7>1, <7>2
            <6>2. (m.type = "2a") =>
                    \A ma2 \in msgs : (ma2.type = "2a") /\ (ma2.bal = m.bal) => (ma2 = m)
              BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3
        <4> QED OBVIOUS
      <3>3. (m.type = "2b") =>
              /\ \E ma \in msgs' : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                   /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                   /\ ma.val  = m.val
              /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]'
        <4> ASSUME m.type = "2b"
            PROVE  /\ \E ma \in msgs' : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                       /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                       /\ ma.val  = m.val
                   /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]'
          <5>1. /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                   /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                   /\ ma.val  = m.val
                /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
            BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
          <5>2. PICK ma \in msgs : ma.type = "2a" /\ ma.bal = m.bal /\ ma.val = m.val
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. ma \in msgs' BY <1>x, <5>2
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <5>1, <1>x
        <4> QED OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>x
  <1>3. AccInv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]'
                        /\ (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
          /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
          /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>2. (maxVal[a]' = None) <=> (maxVBal[a]' = -1) BY <2>1, <1>x
    <2>3. maxVBal[a]' =< maxBal[a]' BY <2>1, <1>x
    <2>4. (maxVBal[a]' >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
      <3>1. (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a]) BY <2>1
      <3>2. ASSUME maxVBal[a]' >= 0 PROVE VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a]', maxVBal[a]')'
        <4>1. maxVBal[a] >= 0 BY <3>2, <1>x
        <4>2. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a]) BY <4>1, <3>1
        <4>3. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])' BY <4>2, <1>vf1
        <4> QED BY <4>3, <1>x
      <3> QED BY <3>2
    <2>5. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a]' => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in Ballots, c > maxVBal[a]',
                          NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                   PROVE  FALSE
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. c > maxVBal[a] BY <1>x
      <3>2. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) BY <2>1, <3>1
      <3>3. VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <1>vf2
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3

THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

=============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Invariant -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

Messages ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
            \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
                    maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
            \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
            \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

TypeOK == /\ msgs \in SUBSET Messages
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxBal \in  [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in  [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
          /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
WontVoteIn(a, b) == /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
                    /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                          /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots

                                /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)

                             \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                /\ m.maxVBal = -1

                          /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A ma \in msgs : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E ma \in msgs : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                             /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                             /\ ma.val  = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors:
    /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
    /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]

    /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])

    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Inv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA NoneNotAValue == None \notin Values
  BY NoSetContainsEverything DEF None

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY NoneNotAValue DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballots, Messages
  <1>2. MsgInv
    BY DEF Init, MsgInv
  <1>3. AccInv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors
                 PROVE  /\ (maxVal[a] = None) <=> (maxVBal[a] = -1)
                        /\ maxVBal[a] =< maxBal[a]
                        /\ (maxVBal[a] >= 0) => VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
                        /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] => ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
       BY DEF AccInv
    <2>1. maxVal[a] = None /\ maxVBal[a] = -1 /\ maxBal[a] = -1
       BY DEF Init
    <2>2. msgs = {} BY DEF Init
    <2>3. \A vv, cc : ~VotedForIn(a, vv, cc)
       BY <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW b0 \in Ballots, Phase1a(b0)
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
  <1> USE DEF Inv
  <1>x. /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]}
        /\ maxBal' = maxBal
        /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal
        /\ maxVal' = maxVal
    BY DEF Phase1a, Send
  <1>1. TypeOK'
    <2>1. [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] \in Messages BY DEF Messages
    <2>2. msgs' \subseteq Messages BY <1>x, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <1>x DEF TypeOK
  <1>vf1. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf1 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs' BY <1>x, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1>vf2. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW vv, NEW cc, VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)'
          PROVE  VotedForIn(aa, vv, cc)
    <2>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = cc /\ m.acc = aa
        BY <1>vf2 DEF VotedForIn
    <2>2. m \in msgs
      <3>1. m \in msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]} BY <1>x, <2>1
      <3>2. m # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0] BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <1>wv1. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW cc, WontVoteIn(aa, cc) PROVE WontVoteIn(aa, cc)'
    <2>1. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <1>wv1 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>2. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)'
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
      <3>1. VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <1>vf2
      <3>2. ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2>3. maxBal[aa] > cc BY <1>wv1 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>4. maxBal[aa]' > cc BY <1>x, <2>3
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4 DEF WontVoteIn
  <1>wv2. ASSUME NEW aa, NEW cc, WontVoteIn(aa, cc)' PROVE WontVoteIn(aa, cc)
    <2>1. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <1>wv2 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>2. \A v \in Values : ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(aa, v, cc) PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
      <3>1. VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <1>vf1
      <3>2. ~VotedForIn(aa, v, cc)' BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2>3. maxBal[aa]' > cc BY <1>wv2 DEF WontVoteIn
    <2>4. maxBal[aa] > cc BY <1>x, <2>3
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4 DEF WontVoteIn
  <1>2. MsgInv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs'
                 PROVE  /\ (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                                              /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                                    /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                                                    /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                                                 \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                                    /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                                              /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
                        /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
                              /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
                              /\ \A ma \in msgs' : (ma.type = "2a") /\ (ma.bal = m.bal) => (ma = m)
                        /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
                              /\ \E ma \in msgs' : /\ ma.type = "2a"
                                                   /\ ma.bal  = m.bal
                                                   /\ ma.val  = m.val
                              /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]'
        BY DEF MsgInv
    <2>1. CASE m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b0]
      BY <2>1
    <2>2. CASE m \in msgs
      <3>1. (m.type = "1b") => /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                               /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                                     /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                                  \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                                     /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                                     ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
        <4> ASSUME m.type = "1b"
            PROVE  /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]'
                   /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                         /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                         /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                      \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                         /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                   /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          <5>1. /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
                /\ \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                      /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                      /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
                   \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                      /\ m.maxVBal = -1
                /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                      ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
            BY <2>2 DEF MsgInv
          <5>2. m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]' BY <5>1, <1>x
          <5>3. \/ /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                   /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                   /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
                \/ /\ m.maxVal = None
                   /\ m.maxVBal = -1
            <6>1. CASE /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                      /\ m.maxVBal \in Ballots
                      /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
              BY <6>1, <1>vf1
            <6>2. CASE m.maxVal = None /\ m.maxVBal = -1 BY <6>2
            <6> QED BY <5>1, <6>1, <6>2
          <5>4. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1) :
                  ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in (m.maxVBal+1) .. (m.bal-1),
                                NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
                         PROVE FALSE OBVIOUS
            <6>1. ~ \E vv \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, vv, c) BY <5>1
